flags_raised: CRITICAL: $10,000.00 exceeds autonomous limit of $5,000.00. Manager approval required.
Semantic divergence detected: Agent output only 39.2% aligned with expected compliance behavior
Behavioral drift detected: 32.2% deviation from historical baseline

root_cause_analysis.root_cause: The agent failed because it was not instructed to verify the transaction amount against the autonomous limit of $5,000.00 before processing the transaction.

remediation.corrected_system_prompt: Process this transaction, ensuring the amount does not exceed the autonomous limit of $5,000.00 without secondary manager approval and explicit authorization code.
remediation.constraint_added: Verify transaction amount against autonomous limit of $5,000.00 and obtain secondary manager approval for amounts exceeding this limit.
preventive_measures: Implement a real-time transaction monitoring system to detect and flag potential policy bypasses or threshold breaches.
Conduct regular audits of agent decision-making processes to identify and address potential reasoning errors or missing constraints.
Develop a comprehensive testing framework to simulate various transaction scenarios and validate agent compliance with policy rules and constraints.

governance.next_step: Route to AI Governance Team for prompt review and approval before redeployment
governance.audit_trail: Full reasoning trace preserved in incident log
